details.note: Desktop architecture: Electron sidecar pattern. Main process: index, sidecar, server, ipc, windows, menu, store. Preload: types, bridge. Renderer: React/TSX with i18n and loading. No existing learning artifacts found for Phase B.
Desktop src tree mapped: 44 files. Main(17), preload(2), renderer(25 inc i18n). Key IPC files: ipc.ts, sidecar.ts, server.ts, preload/index.ts.
Created execDuckDBWrite helper. Spawns duckdb with [dbPath] only (no -readonly, no -c), pipes SQL via stdin. Exports DuckDBWriteError and execDuckDBWrite. Pattern follows pipeline.ts execDuckDB.
Pre-existing bug: Schema.String.annotations is not a function. Blocks duckdb-query.test.ts. Recorded as out-of-scope finding. Defers to follow-on repair slice.
5 analytical tables exist: WAVES, FINDINGS, REGISTRY, QA, DIAGNOSTICS. Need EXECUTION and FEEDBACK tables for record-execution-wave.ts and tool-feedback.ts.
A1 complete. Commit: feat(tools): convert 27 plugin tools to built-in Effect tools with DuckDB backend. 122 files, 8185 insertions, 578 deletions. SHA: a1414d8c8399ff2bb9baa330046ee2aa32f6b54d.
A7 complete: Deleted 35 old plugin files. Kept github-pr-search.ts and github-triage.ts.
Platform interface is the primary customization seam. 50+ IPC channels, 55 hardcoded surfaces. Sidecar protocol has 2 commands, 3 message types. No DI container or plugin system exists.
